<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>

`echo "--- docker-compose.yml ---" && cat docker-compose.yml`

```text
--- docker-compose.yml ---
# ResumePilot — production deployment (5 containers)
#
#   docker compose up -d --build
#   Linux server: ./scripts/server-up.sh  (.env from .env.production.example)
#   Local smoke:  .\scripts\local-prod-up.ps1
#
# Local development: run services in terminals — see docs/실행-가이드.md

name: resume-pilot

services:
  postgres:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg17
    container_name: resume-pilot-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-resumepilot}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-resumepilot}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-resumepilot}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-resumepilot} -d ${POSTGRES_DB:-resumepilot}"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
    ports:
      - "${POSTGRES_PORT:-55532}:5432"

  app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: resume-api/Dockerfile.prod
    container_name: resume-pilot-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: prod
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL:-jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-resumepilot}}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME:-${POSTGRES_USER:-resumepilot}}
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD:-${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-resumepilot}}
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-change-me-to-a-secure-random-string-at-least-256-bits}
      RESUME_AI_SERVICE_URL: ${RESUME_AI_SERVICE_URL:-http://resume-ai:8000}
      RESUME_AI_URL: ${RESUME_AI_SERVICE_URL:-http://resume-ai:8000}
      RAG_SERVICE_URL: ${RAG_SERVICE_URL:-http://rag-service:8002}
      RESUME_CORS_ORIGINS: ${RESUME_CORS_ORIGINS:-}
      INTERNAL_API_TOKEN: ${INTERNAL_API_TOKEN:-}
      LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-}
    ports:
      - "${APP_PORT:-9180}:8080"

  resume-ai:
    build:
      context: ./resume-ai
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: resume-pilot-ai
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - rag-service
      - prompt-service
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: ${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://${POSTGRES_USER:-resumepilot}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-resumepilot}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-resumepilot}}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}
      OPENAI_BASE_URL: ${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}
      OPENAI_MODEL: ${OPENAI_MODEL:-gpt-4o-mini}
      RAG_SERVICE_URL: ${RAG_SERVICE_URL:-http://rag-service:8002}
      PROMPT_SERVICE_URL: ${PROMPT_SERVICE_URL:-http://prompt-service:8001}
      RESUME_API_URL: ${RESUME_API_URL:-http://app:8080}
      INTERNAL_API_TOKEN: ${INTERNAL_API_TOKEN:-}

  prompt-service:
    build:
      context: ./prompt-service
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: resume-pilot-prompt
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: ${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://${POSTGRES_USER:-resumepilot}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-resumepilot}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-resumepilot}}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}
      OPENAI_BASE_URL: ${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}
      OPENAI_MODEL: ${OPENAI_MODEL:-gpt-4o-mini}

  rag-service:
    build:
      context: ./rag-service
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: resume-pilot-rag
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: ${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://${POSTGRES_USER:-resumepilot}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-resumepilot}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-resumepilot}}
      RESUME_API_URL: ${RESUME_API_URL:-http://app:8080}
      INTERNAL_API_TOKEN: ${INTERNAL_API_TOKEN:-}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}
      OPENAI_BASE_URL: ${OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}
      EMBEDDING_MODEL: ${EMBEDDING_MODEL:-text-embedding-3-small}
      EMBEDDING_DIMENSION: ${EMBEDDING_DIMENSION:-1536}

volumes:
  postgres_data:
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\m2b\.claude\projects\e--workspace-resume-pilot\memory\project_resumepilot_ai_architecture.md`

```text

1	---
2	name: project-resumepilot-ai-architecture
3	description: "Why ResumePilot splits AI work into resume-ai/rag-service/prompt-service with no orchestration framework, port scheme coexisting with the \"Horizon\" project, and LLM failover policy"
4	metadata: 
5	  node_type: memory
6	  type: project
7	  originSessionId: c34d56c8-eda2-4028-abdb-a55d9315ff27
8	---
9	
10	ResumePilot's AI side is deliberately split into three separate FastAPI services rather than one `ai-service`:
11	- `prompt-service` — owns prompt templates/versions so admins can edit prompt text via an admin UI with no redeploy.
12	- `rag-service` — isolates embedding/vector-search (pgvector, `text-embedding-3-small`, HNSW cosine) from generation logic. `SEARCH_ORDER = ["EXPERIENCE","RESUME","WRITING_STYLE","PROMPT","REVIEW_RULE"]` in `context_service.py`.
13	- `resume-ai` — the actual executor: LLM call + post-processing (forbidden-expression substitution, AI-trace detection 🟢/🟡/🔴, paragraph review, quality scoring). Not a pass-through despite looking like one.
14	
15	Orchestration is plain HTTP (Spring WebClient / Python httpx) — **no LangChain/LlamaIndex/Haystack/Temporal/Celery/Pinecone/Weaviate/MCP**. This was a deliberate choice, discussed at length: the pipeline is a short linear 3–5 step flow with no branching or long-running workflows, so framework overhead/abstraction would blur the enforced boundaries (see [[project-resumepilot-business-rules]]) and add infra disproportionate to a ~2-month MVP on a single server.
16	
17	**Why:** The user explicitly asked whether to adopt a framework, both for this project and for carrying forward into a next project, and the agreed direction was: keep the *philosophy* (service boundaries, Postgres+pgvector, explicit usage logging, rule-based fallback) but only introduce a framework for a specific layer once it actually becomes complex — e.g. Celery/RQ for background re-embedding jobs, Temporal for multi-step human-in-the-loop approval, LangGraph only for a separate dynamic-tool-choosing agent kept off the user-facing generation path.
18	
19	Other non-obvious infra decisions:
20	- **Port scheme**: ResumePilot deliberately avoids port collisions with an earlier project by the same author, "Horizon" (API 9080/AI 9800/DB 55432), co-located on the same Ubuntu server. ResumePilot uses API 9180 / AI-gateway 9810 / prompt 9811 / rag 9812 / DB 55532 / Web 5273 / Admin 5274, with `COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=resume-pilot` and `resume-pilot-*` container names for network/volume isolation.
21	- **LLM failover policy**: fails over to the next provider/model route on `429/5xx` **and also** `401/403` — reasoning: a single expired/permission-revoked key shouldn't halt service, but if *all* providers return 401/403 the admin should be alerted immediately.
22	- Embedding model is a separate, read-only route in the admin LLM route table (not editable alongside generation/analysis routes) — because swapping in a non-Gemini-compatible embedding model silently broke RAG/embedding once.
23	- Gemini free tier is capped at ~20 calls/day, which is the actual driver behind the multi-provider-failover work (not a hypothetical resilience feature).
24	
25	**How to apply:** Don't suggest wrapping the RAG→prompt→LLM pipeline in a framework by default — only when a specific new requirement (batch jobs, long approval workflows, dynamic tool selection) actually triggers it. When editing docker-compose/ports/env, respect the Horizon-avoidance port scheme rather than reassigning ports ad hoc.
26
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\docs\아키텍처.md`

```text
1	# ResumePilot Architecture
2	
3	## Overview
4	
5	ResumePilot is a RAG-based cover letter writing and review platform with a multi-service monorepo architecture.
6	
7	## 2. 기술 스택 요약
8	
9	```
10	Backend  : Java 21 · Spring Boot 3.5 · Gradle 8 (Groovy DSL) · PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector
11	           · Spring Data JPA · QueryDSL 5 · MapStruct · Lombok · Flyway
12	           · Spring Security · JWT · SpringDoc OpenAPI · WebFlux · PDFBox
13	Frontend : React 19 · TypeScript 6 · Vite 8 · Tailwind CSS 4
14	           · TanStack React Query 5 · React Router 7 · Axios
15	           · i18next / react-i18next · oxlint
16	           · Radix UI (shadcn/ui nova) · Lucide Icons · Geist font
17	AI       : Python 3.12 · FastAPI · Uvicorn · pip (requirements.txt)
18	           · Pydantic v2 · httpx · OpenAI SDK (LLM·임베딩)
19	           · asyncpg · NumPy (rag-service) · PyPDF · Tesseract OCR (resume-ai)
20	Infra    : Docker · Docker Compose (prod 5컨테이너) · Eclipse Temurin 21 · python:3.12-slim
21	           · node:22-alpine (SPA 빌드 스테이지)
22	           · Tailscale (원격 SSH·DB 터널)
23	           · GitHub Actions self-hosted runner (ubuntu-server, master push → deploy)
24	           · Cloudflare Quick Tunnel (cloudflared-quick-resume → :9180, 외부 데모·선택)
25	           · SpecStory / .cursor (Cursor 대화 git 동기화)
26	```
27	
28	| 영역 | 서비스 | 포트 (dev) |
29	|------|--------|------------|
30	| API | resume-api | 8080 |
31	| 사용자 UI | resume-web | 5173 |
32	| 관리자 UI | resume-admin | 5174 (`/admin/`) |
33	| AI Gateway | resume-ai | 8000 |
34	| Prompt | prompt-service | 8001 |
35	| RAG | rag-service | 8002 |
36	| DB | PostgreSQL + pgvector | 5432 |
37	
38	Prod: SPA + API 단일 **app** 포트 (`APP_PORT`, 기본 9180) — [인프라-구성.md](인프라-구성.md).
39	
40	## Service Diagram
41	
42	**Local dev**
43	
44	```
45	resume-web (5173)  ──┐
46	resume-admin (5174) ─┼──> app / resume-api (8080) ──> PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector (5432)
47	                       │         │
48	                       │         └──> resume-ai (8000)
49	                       │                   ├── prompt-service (8001)
50	                       │                   └── rag-service (8002)
51	```
52	
53	**Production (single port)**
54	
55	```
56	Browser ──> app (9180): SPA / + /admin + /api/v1
57	                ├──> resume-ai (internal)
58	                │         ├── prompt-service
59	                │         └── rag-service
60	                └──> PostgreSQL
61	```
62	
63	## Service Responsibilities
64	
65	| Service | Stack | Role |
66	|---------|-------|------|
67	| resume-api | Spring Boot 3.5, Java 21 | JWT auth, domain CRUD, AI orchestration, Flyway migrations |
68	| resume-ai | FastAPI | AI gateway: generation, detection, review, interview questions |
69	| prompt-service | FastAPI | Prompt template runtime (render, version, test) |
70	| rag-service | FastAPI | Embedding, vector search, context assembly |
71	| resume-web | React 19, Vite, Tailwind, shadcn/Radix | User-facing UI |
72	| resume-admin | React 19, Vite, Tailwind, shadcn/Radix | Admin UI |
73	
74	## Data Strategy
75	
76	- Single shared PostgreSQL database
77	- Flyway migrations owned exclusively by **resume-api**
78	- Python services read/write the same schema under contract
79	
80	## Security
81	
82	- JWT Access Token (15 min) + Refresh Token (7 days, stored in DB)
83	- Admin routes protected with `@PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')")`
84	- OAuth extension points reserved in `users` table
85	
86	## Key Business Rules
87	
88	1. AI must never invent user experiences
89	2. All prompts loaded via prompt-service (no hardcoding)
90	3. All AI calls logged to `ai_usage_logs`
91	4. OpenAI key optional — rule-based fallback when absent
92	
93	## Directory Structure
94	
95	```
96	resume-pilot/
97	├── resume-api/       # Spring Boot backend

선택하신 기술 스택 블록을 실제 소스와 대조해보니 몇 가지 반영 안 된 부분이 있습니다.

**AI (가장 중요한 차이)**
- `resume-ai/app/services/llm_service.py`, `generation_service.py`에서 **LangChain**(`langchain-core`, `langchain-openai`의 `ChatOpenAI`)을 실제로 쓰고 있습니다. 문서엔 "OpenAI SDK"만 적혀 있고, 제 메모리에는 오히려 "no LangChain — 의도적으로 프레임워크 배제"라고 기록돼 있어서 **문서·메모리와 실제 코드가 어긋난 상태**입니다. 최근에 도입된 건지, 메모리가 stale한 건지 확인이 필요해 보입니다.
- `Pillow`(이미지 처리)도 resume-ai에 있는데 문서엔 Tesseract OCR만 언급되고 Pillow는 빠져 있습니다.

**Frontend**
- `resume-web`, `resume-admin` 둘 다 `@sentry/react`(에러 트래킹), `next-themes`(다크모드), `sonner`(toast), `vite-plugin-pwa`(resume-web만)가 package.json에 있는데 문서엔 없습니다.

**Backend**
- 문서 내용은 실제 build.gradle과 대체로 일치합니다 (WebFlux, PDFBox, QueryDSL, MapStruct, Flyway 등 모두 확인됨).

가장 먼저 확인이 필요한 건 LangChain 부분입니다 — 이게 의도된 변경(예: ChatOpenAI로 provider failover 단순화)인지, 아니면 문서/메모리가 못 따라간 건지 알려주시면 그에 맞게 문서를 수정하고 메모리도 갱신하겠습니다. 나머지(Sentry/next-themes/sonner/PWA/Pillow) 추가는 바로 반영해도 괜찮을까요?

---

`docs/아키텍처.md`와 메모리 모두 수정했습니다.

- **문서**: LangChain(`langchain-core`/`langchain-openai` `ChatOpenAI`, resume-ai 생성용)과 prompt-service/rag-service의 OpenAI SDK 직접 호출을 구분해서 명시. Pillow, Sentry/next-themes/sonner/vite-plugin-pwa도 추가.
- **메모리**: "no LangChain" 결정이 이후 뒤집혔다는 걸 갱신 항목으로 추가(나머지 no-Temporal/Celery 등은 유지), 범위가 resume-ai 생성 경로에 한정된다는 점도 기록.
